column8: Improved script baseline. SOTA params (CLIP=15, MLP=4.35, GPTQ128). Artifact=16.06MB ❌ (code 145KB). Sliding=1.07219.
Bigram hash 1024×64. +155KB artifact, BPB worse. Sliding=1.07248.
Bigram hash 2048×128. +225KB artifact, BPB worse. Sliding=1.07368.
Trigram hash 1024×64. +155KB artifact, within noise. Sliding=1.07235.
VARLEN_ATTENTION=1. BEST PRE-QUANT & POST-QUANT EVER! −0.005 BPB. Artifact=16.06MB ❌ (code size). Sliding=1.07632.
HESSIAN_CLIP=0.3. Within noise. Artifact=16.09MB ❌.
Bigram+VarLen. VarLen does all work, bigram adds nothing. Artifact=16.21MB ❌. Sliding=1.07607.
MoE 2 experts top-1 layer 5. Much worse BPB (+0.009). Slower training. Artifact=16.04MB ❌. Sliding=1.08091.
CLIP=13+hessian+MLP=4.0. Worse BPB. Smaller MLP loses capacity. Artifact=16.04MB ❌. Sliding=1.07282.
Bigram+Trigram+MLP=4.0. Artifact=15.52MB ✅ but worse BPB. N-grams don't compensate for reduced MLP. Sliding=1.07604.
Repro of exp58_ttt on Apr 16. TTT=1.07058, artifact=15.989MB. Confirms best config within ~1e-4 BPB and within budget.
Baseline: 11L×512d SP8192 GQA, QK5.25, depth recur, parallel resid, EMA0.9965, 4xA100 3600s. Pre-quant/post-quant BPB.
QK_GAIN_INIT=7.0 vs 5.25 baseline. Within noise (~0.0003). QK gain saturated.
NUM_LOOPS=3 (20 virtual layers). Slower (1.0M tok/s), fewer steps, worse BPB than 2-loop baseline.
WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.50 vs 0.72 baseline. Later warmdown start hurts convergence by +0.0025 pre-quant BPB.
MATRIX_LR=0.030 vs 0.022 baseline. Within noise. Post-quant slightly better but pre-quant slightly worse.
WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.80. New best pre-quant! -0.0006 vs baseline. Trend: 0.50 < 0.72 < 0.80.
WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.85. Best pre-quant yet! Trend continues: 0.50 < 0.72 < 0.80 < 0.85.
WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.90. Tied with 0.85. Plateau reached — 0.85 is the sweet spot.
WARMDOWN=0.85+MUON_WD=0.06. Trains faster mid-run but worse final: less regularization hurts convergence.
WARMDOWN=0.85+ENABLE_LOOPING_AT=0.20. Fewer steps (4641 vs 4989) due to longer slow phase. Worse by +0.0007.
WARMDOWN=0.85+EMA_DECAY=0.998. Slower EMA hurts pre-quant by +0.0023. 0.9965 is better.
1800s screen: SOFTCAP=20. Best screening result, −0.0014 vs baseline at 1800s.
1800s screen: ROPE_DIMS=32. Second best, −0.0009 vs baseline at 1800s.
1800s screen: GRAD_CLIP=0.5. Third best, −0.0007 vs baseline at 1800s.
1800s screen: SCALAR_LR=0.03. Fourth best, −0.0005 vs baseline at 1800s.
1800s screen: EMBED_LR=0.3. No improvement vs baseline.
1800s screen: MUON_BETA2=0.99. No improvement vs baseline.
1800s screen: TIED_EMBED_LR=0.05. Worse than baseline.
1800s screen: MLP_MULT=3.5. Worse than baseline.
1800s screen: PARALLEL_RESIDUAL_START=5. Worse than baseline.
1800s screen: SOFTCAP=50. Much worse, especially post-quant.
Full 3600s: SOFTCAP=20+WD=0.85. BEST RUN. −0.00282 pre-quant, −0.00231 post-quant vs SOTA defaults.
SOFTCAP=20+ROPE_DIMS=32. Rope32 doesn't stack with softcap20 (+0.0007).
SOFTCAP=20+GRAD_CLIP=0.5. GradClip doesn't stack with softcap20 (+0.0005).
SOFTCAP=15. Slightly worse than 20. Softcap=20 is the sweet spot.
SOFTCAP=20+SCALAR_LR=0.03. ScalarLR doesn't stack with softcap20.
SOFTCAP=20+EMA=0.997. Runner-up. Post-quant marginally best at 1.08830.
SOFTCAP=20+WD=0.80. Third best overall.
SOFTCAP=25. Worse than 20. Full sweep: 15 < 20 > 25 > 30 > 50. SC=20 confirmed optimal.
train_gpt_improved.py baseline. 35.9M params. ARTIFACT=15.96MB (FITS 16MB!). BPB worse by +0.003 vs 04_09 best.
improved.py MLP=4.5. NEW BEST BPB! But artifact=17.17MB (over 16MB). Need smaller model.
improved.py MLP=4.25. 37.4M params. Artifact=16.57MB (still over 16MB).
improved.py MLP=4.06. 36.3M params. Artifact=16.10MB (still over, worse BPB than baseline).
improved.py WARMDOWN_WD_MULT=1.5. Worse BPB, same artifact size. Extra WD doesn't help.
improved.py NORMUON=1. Within noise of baseline. Row normalization post-NS doesn't help.
improved.py ROPE_DIMS=16 (default=32). Worse than 32. Confirms ROPE_DIMS=32 is better.
improved.py GATED_ATTENTION=1. BPB −0.00146 pre, −0.00165 post. Artifact=16.05MB (52KB over!).
improved.py LOOP_EMBEDDINGS=1. Marginal pre-quant gain, worse post-quant. Not worth it.
GATED+CLIP=10. Best post-quant BPB! But artifact=17.46MB — tighter clip hurts compressibility.
GATED+CLIP=15. Fits 15.19MB! Best pre-quant. Loose clip hurts post-quant but saves ~900KB for more params.
GATED+CLIP=15+MLP=4.25. Best compliant run. Pre-quant=1.07589, artifact=15.75MB.
GATED+CLIP=15+MLP=4.35. Pre-quant=1.07518, post-quant=1.09027, artifact=15.98MB. Fits 16MB with 24KB to spare!
GATED+CLIP=13+MLP=4.35. Best post-quant=1.08670! But artifact=16.83MB (over 16MB).
CLIP=14+MLP=4.35+hessian_clip=0.3+ANS. Worse on every metric. Only 4394 steps, artifact=16.39MB (over). ANS compression bigger than zlib.
Rerun of clip15/MLP4.35 baseline with current code. Killed by signal before completion.
CLIP=15+MLP=4.35+hessian_clip=0.3. Artifact=16.04MB (fits!). Hessian clipping improves post-quant by −0.0008.
CLIP=15+MLP=4.35+GPTQ_CALIBRATION=128. Artifact=16.01MB (fits!). Best compliant post-quant. 128 cal batches > 64.
CLIP=15+MLP=4.35+LOOP_BITS=8. Best post-quant ever! But artifact=19.01MB (way over). Int8 loops = +3MB.
CLIP=15+MLP=4.35+clip_early=0.85/loop=0.9. Good post-quant but artifact=16.45MB (over by 450KB).
CLIP=13+MLP=4.15. Artifact=16.57MB (over). Clip=13 incompatible with 16MB even at MLP=4.15.
CLIP=13+MLP=4.20. Artifact=16.57MB (over). Same artifact as 4.15 — clip dominates size, MLP ≈irrelevant.
CLIP=15+MLP=4.40. Artifact=16.29MB (over by 290KB). More MLP capacity doesn't help enough.
CLIP=15+MLP=4.35+window_attn layers 0-2 (size=512). Pre-quant worse (+0.015), post-quant much worse (+0.019). Artifact=16.01MB. Window attn hurts quality badly.
Stripped script + GPTQ_CAL=128 + CLIP=15+MLP=4.35. NEW BEST COMPLIANT! Artifact=15.99MB ✅. Smaller code (83KB) = more model budget.
Stripped + GPTQ_CAL=128 + hessian_clip=0.3. Artifact=16.015MB (15KB over!). Hessian inflates artifact slightly vs exp56.
Stripped + GPTQ_CAL=128 + TTT_ENABLED=1. Artifact=15.99MB ✅. TTT BPB=1.07045! −0.00184 from sliding window. NEW BEST with TTT.
Stripped + GPTQ_CAL=128 + MLP=4.30. Artifact=15.99MB ✅. Worse BPB than MLP=4.35 across the board. Sliding=1.07298.
MLP=4.30+LOOP_BITS=7+hessian=0.3. Best post-quant=1.08624, sliding=1.06955! But artifact=17.18MB ❌.
GPTQ_CAL=256. Artifact=15.99MB ✅. ≈Same as 128 (1.08916 vs 1.08881). Diminishing returns.
EVAL_STRIDE=32. Artifact=15.99MB ✅. Same sliding BPB=1.07230 as stride=64 but 2x eval time.
EMA=0.997. Artifact=15.99MB ✅. Worse pre-quant (+0.0007). 0.9965 remains optimal.
12L+MLP=3.85. Artifact=15.98MB ✅. Extra layer hurts: fewer steps (4850) and worse BPB. 11L is better.
CLIP=14+MLP=4.25 stripped. Artifact=16.11MB ❌. Clip=14 doesn't fit even with smaller MLP and stripped code.
Seed=42 repro + TTT. TTT=1.07112. Artifact=16.01MB ❌ (13KB over). Confirms exp58 within noise (Δ=0.0007 TTT).
SOFTCAP=18. Worse than 20. Confirms SC=20 optimal.
WARMDOWN=0.88. Within noise of 0.85 but artifact 13KB over. 0.85 remains best.
EMBED_BITS=6. Artifact=14.97MB ✅ (1MB spare!) but post-quant catastrophic (+0.029 BPB).
GRAD_CLIP=0.5. Worse on all metrics. Doesn't stack with softcap20.
12L+MLP=3.85+TTT. TTT=1.07557. Fewer steps (4852), worse BPB. 11L is better.
EMBED_BITS=6+MLP=4.45. Artifact=15.25MB ✅ but post-quant ruined (+0.028 BPB). 6-bit embeds not viable.
GPTQ256+TTT. TTT=1.07076. Artifact=16.02MB ❌. Marginal post-quant gain over 128 but doesn't fit.
MUON_WD=0.08. Worse on all metrics. WD=0.095 optimal.

QK_GAIN=6.0+SOFTCAP=18. Within noise. No benefit from this combo.-exp86_varlen_ttt_base1.06680/1.0812080.55356-sliding_sotaVarLen+hessian+sliding=1.07405 (new SOTA for improved_04_15). Artifact not yet size-checked. Checkpoint reused for exp97-106 EVAL_ONLY.

commit: -exp97_ttt_fp_sgd5e3-/1.1020580.50-discardEVAL_ONLY TTT fullparam SGD lr=5e-3 mom=0.9. +0.028 BPB vs sliding. TTT HURTS.
-exp100_ttt_fp_ep1-/1.1013880.50-discardepochs=1 (single grad step per chunk). +0.027 BPB. Damage happens on step 1.
-exp105_ttt_lora_sl4096OOM80.50-discardLoRA TTT sl=4096. OOMed (48-step adapt too heavy).
